title: End-to-end DVB-T2 FEC + BICM simulation
description: Integrate all DVB-T2 FEC components into a complete end-to-end simulation: BCH outer code + LDPC inner code + bit interleaving (column-row) + QAM modulation (BICM). Generate FER curves over AWGN and compare against Shannon limit. Validate full TP04 -> TP05 -> TP06 -> TP07a chain. This is the primary integration milestone for DVB-T2.
